title: Sea of Thieves
description: Pirate game. Lot's of fun with friends.

title: Satisfactory
description: The factory must grow. I may have an addiction to this game.

title: Bloons TD 6
description: Nice thing to have in the background while doing other stuff.

title: Minecraft
description: A timeless classic. It will never not be fun, especially thanks to mods.

title: Dicey Dungeons
description: Gambling Strategy Game. Need I say more?

title: Transport Fever 2
description: Create a transport company and move things.

title: Ready or Not
description: S.W.A.T. simulator. It is realistic and you will get PTSD.

title: Entry Point
description: Fantastic 4-player CO-OP stealth shooter and on Roblox as well. Suprising.

title: Operators
description: Made by the same guy as Entry Point, now with an upgraded engine and even more mechanics.

title: Entry Point: Freelancer's Cut
description: Remake of Entry Point with Operators engine.

title: The Wandering Village
description: City builder where you build on the back of Onbu.

title: Road 96
description: Go on a road trip to cross the border and escape a dictatorship.

title: Firewatch
description: Lovely little hiking game with beautiful music, visuals and story.

title: Hi-Fi Rush
description: An action game where everything moves to the beat of the music.

title: CARRION
description: Ever seen any horror movie with a monster? That, but you're the monster.
